title: Angel Strategy Questions
wikitext:
[]: Angel Strategy Questions             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Jun 25, 2009 8:24 pm I have a couple of questions about the actions of certain angels. When Ramiel was drilling into the Geofront, what was he going to do if he succeeded in reaching the bottom? Was he trying to touch Lilith that he thought was Adam with his drill? He certainly couldn't fit into the hole he was drilling. Also why did he waste its time drilling instead of just blasting his way in. Sachiel's beam penetrated into the Geofront in only a few blasts, so Ramiels stronger beam should have blasted a hole big enough for him to fit through in 1 or 2 blasts. With Shamshel, what would he do, dig his way inside by hacking at the ground with the energy whips, or was he just drawn there and didn't know what to do next? What if Shamshel had beat Unit-01? Shamshel, "Hell yeah!! I beat that purple giant and all those exploding things! ....Now what do I do...?" Any thoughts about these or the actions about angels I didn't mention?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Jun 25, 2009 8:37 pm Why was Ramiel's drill mechanical, for that matter?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Jun 25, 2009 9:39 pm Ramiel might not have been willing to risk hurting Adam/Lilith with its laser, so it took a slower route. I suspect that Rebuild Ramiel might be a better indicator here, that the drill is just as much a part of Ramiel as everything else. Shamshel's plasma would have allowed it to cut through the security doors (think like a lightsaber) and just work its way down.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Jun 25, 2009 10:10 pm ^So that might mean Sachiel was a little reckless. Then again he might have skydived into a hole he blasted. What about Leliel? Would the shadow dissapear and reappear until enough of the ground swallowed up until it reached the bottom? Also Sahaquiel would have blasted the Geofront to pieces if she dropped her whole mass on Tokyo 3 judging from the size of the craters of smaller pieces. Would the angel really risk blasting Adam/Lilith to pieces just to get close enough?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Jun 25, 2009 10:15 pm Legendary pretty much covered it all. Nothing else to see here on those angels. And...I am not going to go into discussing the other angels because I am really, really sure there are multiple threads on this same topic, one just has to utilize the search function and/or do some digging.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Jun 25, 2009 11:02 pm Sammaeloo wrote: ^So that might mean Sachiel was a little reckless. Then again he might have skydived into a hole he blasted. What about Leliel? Would the shadow dissapear and reappear until enough of the ground swallowed up until it reached the bottom? Also Sahaquiel would have blasted the Geofront to pieces if she dropped her whole mass on Tokyo 3 judging from the size of the craters of smaller pieces. Would the angel really risk blasting Adam/Lilith to pieces just to get close enough?

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Jun 25, 2009 11:17 pm Just how far below is Lilith imprisoned?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Jun 25, 2009 11:23 pm Assuming Lilith is at the bottom of the facility, ~14 kilometers. [url]http://www.evacommentary.org/images_production/geofront-dimensional.jpg[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Jun 26, 2009 2:24 pm Given that the Angels are basically newborn children irrationally looking for their mother due to loneliness and instinct, they might not fully be aware of any errors in their plans, only wildly doing everything they can think of to get to Her.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Mon Jun 29, 2009 1:08 am Why was Ramiel's drill mechanical, for that matter?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Jun 29, 2009 10:54 am I don't think the Angels really plan things out in advance. I mean Sahaquiel? Hello? "I'm coming Mommy!" Hits ground 50 miles away from Lilith. BOOM. Destroys half of Japan. Some NERV Guy in America: ....Um....looks like Tokyo-3 and Lilith's gone. NERV Guy 2: So...like... Third Impact can't happen right? NERV Guy 1: I...I guess so. NERV Guy 2: So we've....we've won right? NERV Guy 1: Guess so. Uh...Drinks to celebrate? NERV Guy 2: ...Ok. -Most anti-climatic ending ever.
